I've gotten incredible feedback from everybody, right? So I know the program is really everything that you wanted it to be. Better be for all the time I put into some money, right? Anyway, I just want to give you a short quick thoughts for the weekend, right? Number one, the people in your life who are the naysayers, the doubting Thomas, the so-called dream stompers, right? They want to stop on your hopes and your dreams. Just remember, these people at this point are toxic. You can't afford to have them in your life. When you just start in something where you're taking massive action, you're really going to put your best foot forward, right? In those first few weeks, while you're getting traction, while you're working extra hard, you got to shut these people out. You know, who you surround yourself with, the people that you speak to on a daily basis are going to be instrumental in either driving a success or holding you back from achieving success at the level that you're capable of. Just think of this. It's a very short thought for today, but if there's anybody in your life who is not totally 100% behind you that really has your best interest on it, you got to remove these people from your life right now. They cannot be in your life today. I'll tell you why, because when you're really just starting something and really working extra hard, this is the danger zone, because you're not quite getting the results yet. You're putting in the extra work and all you need is that one chirp, chirp, chirp of negative ear and they'll drag you down. So please, whenever possible, wipe those negative people out of your life right now. Now, through your family, I understand that a bit more difficult, but just say, listen, just please do me a favor. I'm working on something new here. I'm working really on. Just don't say anything to me for the next 90 days. Just anything, even negative thought, just hold that thought. You can write it down. And the 91st day, you can destroy me, smash me. Just pick me all up on day 91. You get it? The reason for that is because by then you'll have massive results and no one will be able to stop you or talk you out of this. All right? Just stay focused, surround yourself with positive people and I promise you, the rest will take care of itself because the system works plain and simple. You get it?
